ValidationRule.description: Tier-2 enforcement (F10). A GiftTransaction marked Paid must carry a TransactionDate. Forces the learner to resolve the SOURCE "blank payment date + inactive source code" defect: an unpaid/scheduled pledge should not migrate as a Paid gift with no date. Seed-safe: seed gifts are Status=Paid AND have TransactionDate, so they pass. Fires when a Paid record arrives with a blank date.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A Paid gift transaction must have a Transaction Date. If this is an unpaid or scheduled pledge, set the correct Status rather than migrating it as Paid with a blank date.
